brand_voice_note: Confident and category-leading, framing whole-home water filtration around premium performance, hands-on support, and price certainty.

concepts.product_title: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market - AWESOME WATER®
concepts.primary_text:
Better everyday drinking water, straight from your tap.

Our Ceramic Fluoride Dome Filter is the No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market, built to reduce fluoride and other unwanted contaminants sip after sip.

Use it on its own or drop it into a complete Awesome Water bundle. Backed by our Price Beat Guarantee.
concepts.headline: Premium Fluoride Filtration
concepts.why_it_works: Fluoride reduction is the single most desirable outcome for this buyer, so leading with cleaner daily drinking water speaks straight to their intent.

concepts.product_title: Awesome Water® - Paragon CP-4 - Filtration System. (New 2024)
concepts.primary_text:
Not sure what is really in your tap water?

The Paragon CP-4 under-sink system tackles ultra-fine particles, heavy metals, VOCs, pharmaceuticals and forever chemicals, all from a tankless setup that fits neatly under your bench.

Now $499, was $898. Every install is backed by our 24 hour help line and repair manual support.
concepts.headline: Under-Sink Filtration, Sorted
concepts.why_it_works: The CP-4 solves the hidden worry of unseen contaminants, so naming that friction and listing what it removes turns concern into an easy decision.

concepts.product_title: Awesome Water® - Soda Tap 3 in 1 SHOW ROOM - SALE
concepts.primary_text:
Spending big on a tap system you have never seen in person? Come look first.

As an official Soda Tap retailer, supplier and installer, we have a dedicated showroom at our Kirrawee office where you can see the 3 in 1 system, compare finishes and ask questions before you commit.

Showroom offer now $2,299, was $5,900. Price Beat Guarantee included.
concepts.headline: See The Soda Tap In Person
concepts.why_it_works: At this price point the biggest hesitation is buying unseen, so offering an in-person showroom and expert install directly removes that risk.
